message:
bd-1xma.2: implement egg-based equality saturation for crossing minimization

Add egraph_crossing.rs module with:
- OrderingLang: egg Language trait for layer orderings encoded as sequences
- adjacent_swap_rules(): rewrite rule for generating equivalent orderings
- saturate_layer(): main entry point for equality saturation
- collect_orderings(): enumerate orderings from saturated e-graph
- extract_best_ordering(): find ordering with minimum crossings

The module enables finding globally optimal node orderings by exploring
the full equivalence class via equality saturation, rather than greedy
local search. Includes 11 tests verifying:
- Roundtrip encoding/decoding
- All permutations discoverable (2-node: 2, 3-node: 6)
- Optimal orderings extracted for known crossing patterns

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
